Why Neptune?

Choose from 3 light tones

Cool White, Natural White, and Warm Amber — find the perfect tone for any task or time of day.

❄️
Cool White

Bright, crisp light for detailed tasks. Enhances clarity so you can see small details easily.

☀️
Natural White

Balanced light that mimics natural daylight. Comfortable for everyday use.

🌙
Warm Amber

Soft, warm glow for nighttime use. Gentle on the eyes and relaxing.
